scope: Apple-like translucent cozy collection album/card UI proof candidates compatible with Round173 UI icons and Round175 interaction UI.

generation_method.notes: Generator outputs are preserved under raw/. Per LESSON-019 and LESSON-022, final PNGs are alpha-safe local RGBA synthesized/normalized proof candidates rather than trusted white/opaque generator sheets.

checks: transparent alpha holes inside alpha bbox
no readable text/letters/numbers requested or synthesized

items.intended_ui_use: empty collection card background for not-yet-collected memory/photo entries
items.intended_ui_layer: album card base below artwork, sticker slots, badges, and card state overlays
items.opacity_recommendation: 65-85% base alpha; keep highlights below content layers
items.nine_slice_recommendation: recommended margins [36, 44, 36, 44] if scaled; preserve 26-32 px corner radius
items.prompt: Use case: mobile cozy game collection album UI. Asset type: transparent PNG album card base. Primary request: one empty rounded vertical card made of Apple-like translucent frosted glass, soft white rim, subtle warm mint and sky reflections, empty center for future artwork, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no icon, no character, no object, no background, clean transparent corners.
risks: Proof-only asset; requires visual review against actual album/card layouts before runtime mapping.
No runtime logical asset ID or AssetResolver mapping is included in this pack.

items.intended_ui_use: warm collected card state with gentle glow for completed album/card entries
items.intended_ui_layer: collected-state card base below artwork and above card_shadow_soft
items.opacity_recommendation: 70-90% for base, glow can pulse 20-40% with separate modulate
items.nine_slice_recommendation: recommended margins [38, 48, 38, 48] if scaled; avoid stretching outer glow too far
items.prompt: Use case: mobile cozy game collection album UI. Asset type: transparent PNG collected card highlight. Primary request: one rounded vertical collected-state glass card with gentle golden mint glow, soft inner bloom, celebratory but calm child-friendly polish, empty center for artwork, no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no icon, no character, no object, no background, clean transparent corners.
risks: Proof-only asset; requires visual review against actual album/card layouts before runtime mapping.
No runtime logical asset ID or AssetResolver mapping is included in this pack.

items.intended_ui_use: unlabeled page tab plate compatible with Round173 icons

items.opacity_recommendation: 70-88%; selected state can add separate collection_stamp_soft or glow
items.prompt: Use case: mobile cozy game collection album UI. Asset type: transparent PNG page tab. items.intended_ui_use: round sticker placeholder/slot for collection cards
items.intended_ui_layer: card detail layer above album_card_glass_empty and below sticker artwork
items.opacity_recommendation: 55-78%; keep inner center open for icon/sticker
items.nine_slice_recommendation: not recommended; circular sprite should scale uniformly
items.prompt: Use case: mobile cozy game collection album UI. Asset type: transparent PNG sticker slot.
